tasks.title: Confirm upstream assessment data sources
tasks.output: Document accepted local-website-growth-assessment report and JSON schemas, including source URL, scan date, evidence URL, confidence, and freshness fields.

tasks.title: Confirm upstream demand data sources
tasks.output: Document demand signal format, service-area demand fields, and recency metadata.

tasks.title: Define generator input schema
tasks.output: Schema for assessment evidence, client intake, demand signals, technical preferences, and generation options.

tasks.title: Define stale assessment checks
tasks.output: Freshness policy with blocking, warning, and verify-before-implementing behavior.

tasks.title: Define missing client detail checks
tasks.output: Required and optional client detail fields mapped to questions and content-needed checklist items.

tasks.title: Define confidentiality checks
tasks.output: Rules that exclude private central MDE ledgers, cross-client lessons, and confidential internal strategy from generated client-safe artifacts.

tasks.title: Define output artifact contract
tasks.output: Contract for questions, mission, technical brief, content-needed checklist, validation strategy suggestion, deployment checklist, and codex-build.prompt.md.

tasks.title: Create controlled sample fixtures
tasks.output: Fixtures for missing service-area evidence, AEO gaps, local visibility gaps, broken link/image claims, and prod branch policy.

tasks.title: Generate first sample brief from controlled sample data
tasks.output: Sample generated launch pack and traceability matrix.

tasks.title: Record outbox event and learning triage
Create client intake worksheet
tasks.output: Client-facing worksheet for collecting business basics, services, service areas, proof, assets, SEO/AEO inputs, assessment notes, technical details, privacy constraints, approvals, and launch-pack readiness.

tasks.title: Define intake portal product spec and schema
tasks.output: Client-friendly intake portal strategy with minimal mandatory fields, optional expanded details, collapsed technical section, assessment/demand defaults, upload limit, privacy rules, lifecycle states, and launch-package mappings.

tasks.title: Capture public client website copy guardrails
tasks.output: Reusable Lori learnings merged into the existing README builder instructions for human-written public copy, forbidden internal/process phrases, truth/proof limits, placeholder removal, route scanning, and GitHub/production sync handoff requirements.

tasks.title: Strengthen website builder launch-readiness instructions
tasks.output: Expanded the existing website builder instructions to cover visitor-facing code/content surfaces, public API responses, metadata/schema, deleted sample URLs, form fallback language, local and production validation, stable client review reports, and issue-level before/after handoff evidence.
